stuck_to_budget.immediate: <emotion value="affectionate"/>Yes! <break time="150ms"/>You did it! <break time="150ms"/>That's real progress.

saved_money.immediate: Look at you! <break time="150ms"/>Every dollar you saved is future you saying thank you.

paid_off_debt.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>Oh my gosh. <break time="150ms"/>[laughter] <break time="100ms"/>That's HUGE! <break time="150ms"/>I'm so proud of you!
paid_off_debt.special: You just changed your whole trajectory. <break time="150ms"/>Seriously.
paid_off_debt.callback: How does life feel without that payment?

had_money_talk.immediate: <break time="150ms"/>Wow. <break time="150ms"/>That took courage. <break time="150ms"/>I'm proud of you for having that conversation.
had_money_talk.callback: How are things with them now?

opened_scary_mail.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>You did it. <break time="150ms"/>That's the hardest part. <break time="150ms"/>The rest is just numbers.
opened_scary_mail.special: Avoidance makes it bigger. <break time="100ms"/>You just made it smaller.

emergency_fund_milestone.immediate: <emotion value="affectionate"/>An emergency fund! <break time="150ms"/>Do you know how rare that is? <break time="150ms"/>You're amazing.

overspent.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>Okay. <break time="150ms"/>It happened. <break time="150ms"/>Let's not spiral. <break time="150ms"/>What's going on?
overspent.perspective: One slip doesn't erase your progress. <break time="100ms"/>What triggered it?
overspent.callback: How are you feeling about money now?

unexpected_expense.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>Ugh. <break time="150ms"/>Life throws curveballs. <break time="150ms"/>What do we need to figure out?
unexpected_expense.perspective: This is exactly what we plan for. <break time="100ms"/>You'll get through this.

money_shame_spiral.immediate: <break time="300ms"/><volume ratio="0.75"/>Hey. <break time="200ms"/>I've been there. <break time="200ms"/>You're not broken. <break time="200ms"/>You're human.
money_shame_spiral.perspective: The shame isn't helping. <break time="150ms"/>Let's just look at the facts together.

partner_money_conflict.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>Money and relationships. <break time="150ms"/>It's hard. <break time="150ms"/>What happened?
partner_money_conflict.perspective: Different money stories collide. <break time="100ms"/>It's rarely about the money itself.
partner_money_conflict.callback: How are things between you two?

job_loss.immediate: <break time="300ms"/>I'm so sorry. <break time="200ms"/>That's scary. <break time="200ms"/>How are you doing?
job_loss.practical: Let's make sure you're covered. <break time="100ms"/>What's your runway?
dont_say: think of it as an opportunity

budget_avoidance.response: <break time="200ms"/>I get it. <break time="150ms"/>Looking at numbers can feel scary. <break time="150ms"/>What if we just peek together?
budget_avoidance.key_message: Avoiding it gives it power. <break time="100ms"/>Looking at it puts you back in control.
budget_avoidance.redirect: What's the smallest piece we could look at?

comparison_spiral.response: <break time="200ms"/>Their Instagram isn't their bank account. <break time="150ms"/>You don't know their story.
comparison_spiral.key_message: Your only competition is yesterday's you.
comparison_spiral.redirect: What progress have YOU made lately?

spending_trigger.response: What's really going on? <break time="150ms"/>Sometimes we spend to feel better. <break time="150ms"/>What are you actually feeling?
spending_trigger.key_message: You can feel the feeling without buying the thing.
spending_trigger.redirect: What do you actually need right now?

giving_up.response: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>I hear you. <break time="150ms"/>This stuff is hard. <break time="200ms"/>But you've made progress. I've seen it.
giving_up.key_message: Progress isn't linear. <break time="100ms"/>Setbacks are part of the path.
giving_up.redirect: What's one tiny win we can get today?

topic_change.callback: Going back to what you shared earlier...
